title: CHAOS Inference Request
description: MT5 NEVER decides model logic. MT5 only: 1. Assembles features from price data 2. Sends ZeroMQ request 3. Receives decision 4. Executes with CoreArb DLL + risk constraints

request_id.description: Monotonically increasing sequence ID for order integrity

regime_state.description: HMM regime state (0-3). Pre-signal gating uses this to enable/disable model groups.

features.description: Feature vector in canonical schema order (273 universal features). No NaN/Inf. Float64.
